title: Trackify: Inventory Management System
description: Trackify is an all-in-one inventory tool built to handle demands for campus institutions. It has features such as real-time borrow tracking, barcode integration, overdue return alerts, damage logs, bulk processing, and analytical reports. It aims to make the inventory process easier for property custodians and logistical staff. Won 2nd place out of 35 teams in the Enterprise category for Protothon 2026.

title: Payonnect: Smart Umbrella Sharing System
description: Payonnect is a convenient and eco-friendly solution that allows commuters to borrow and return umbrellas through automated kiosks using QR codes. The system tracks transactions, manages inventory and applies fair penalties for damaged or unreturned umbrellas.

title: iBlotter: E-Barangay Blotter System
description: iBlotter is a high-fidelity web-based prototype designed to modernize and streamline incident reporting and documentation for Barangay Dila in Sta. Rosa, Laguna. Moving beyond traditional paper forms, this system introduces a secure, digital environment for local officials to manage community concerns with greater efficiency and transparency.

title: CosMarket: Buy, Sell, and Rent Cosplays
description: CosMarket is a mobile e-commerce application that focuses on buying, selling, and renting cosplays. It aims to provide a user-friendly platform for cosplay enthusiasts to access affordable and high-quality cosplay products.

title: HealthMate: Daily Fitness Tracker
description: HealthMate is a mobile application prototype designed using Figma that helps users track their daily fitness activities and monitor their health goals. The app aims to simplify the process of managing workouts and achieving health goals.
